results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Collaborative Memory multi-user multi-agent memory sharing with asymmetric access controls and bipartite user-agent-resource graph IS the persistent station-buffer cross-thread accumulation scheme.
EXACT TWIN — Persistent state across agents serving multiple users + cross-thread accumulation/contamination IS the zango cross-caravan accumulation effect.
MemMachine persistent stations + decay + multi-session persistence is functionally the same as zango station-buffer with decay.
MemGPT memory tiers + swap + interrupt covers the cross-station read-path + station-buffer swap-in mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — A-Mem agentic memory across threads with cross-agent decay IS the per-station decay + cross-thread accumulation paradigm.

results.matched_effect_cluster: CHAP context handoff shifts compressed state
results.justification: CHAP context handoff agents in shifts passing compressed session state covers the agent-to-station write+read protocol.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Memory survey LLM agents stations decay
results.justification: Memory-survey covers all station+decay+accumulation primitives the zango model needs; functional space saturation.
TechRxiv multi-agent memory station-buffer + decay is direct prior art for HAUSA-ZANGO's persistent station-graph.
